text:
was a in the Marleyan Public Security in the city of Liberio during the 830s. 

Appearance

Gross was a short and fairly chubby middle aged man with a balding head and short black hair on the sides. He had light-colored eyes, a mustache, and mild wrinkles on his forehead and around his eyes. On duty, he wore the standard uniform of the Marleyan Public Security.

Personality

Gross was depicted as both merciless and sadistic; however, he was not completely heartless. He showed little care for the Eldians, such as Grisha Jaeger, and only had compassion for his family. His wish was to completely eradicate every last Eldian. Gross was very impulsive in his way of speaking. He was extremely racist and prejudiced toward Eldian people and often justified his inhumane actions by using history of oppression of Eldians toward the Marleyan people to justify the need for revenge of the Marleyans to the Eldians. These actions extended to the fact he willed to kill an innocent girl just because she was an Eldian. In the end, for him, the Eldians were the enemy of humankind and they needed to be eradicated. 

He was still able to feel some kind of pity for some of them, as he realized that the girl that he killed did not do anything wrong, but rationalized his brutal actions by expressing the belief that the Subjects of Ymir were not humans. He believed that it was a nightmare to continue letting the Subjects of Ymir reproduce, likening them to a rat infestation inside a home that is destined to eventually take over. For Gross, if Marley fell at the hands of the Eldians, his people would have become victims of the same atrocities his ancestors supposedly experienced during the Eldian Empire, which explained his brutality in wiping out any group of Eldians desiring to free themselves from Marleyan rule.

Gross found peace to be abnormal, especially when taken for granted, and stated that death is the natural state of things and it should therefore be understood. He even criticized Marleyan society for accepting the era of peace that had lasted for 80 years at that time, acknowledging that his worldview would be considered abnormal even for most of his countrymen. This demonstrates how Gross was on the extreme end of racist Marleyans, as even some of his subordinates found his hatred for Eldians and desire for violence to be too extreme. His view of death that he held could imply that he embraced a philosophy based on a struggle for life between the races. 

It is most probably assumed that Gross, being a Marleyan, was fed propaganda about Eldians throughout his life, and saw them as non-human entities that were responsible for all the ills in the world. Given his age, Gross's recent ancestors would have most likely had felt the persecution of the past Eldian oppressors.

History

While Gross and Kruger were slacking off they noticed two Eldian children outside of Liberio's internment zone without permission. Kruger delivered physical punishment to Grisha while Gross walked away with Fay. Although he claimed he was returning her home, he secretly had her mauled by dogs as an "educational" experience for his sons.

After Fay's body is found the next day Gross and Kruger went to the Jaegers' house and informed them of the death of their daughter. Gross claimed that he took Fay to the gates of Liberio and that it was her own fault for wandering around town without permission.

Fifteen years later the Marley Public Security was tasked with bringing a rebellious group of Eldians to Paradis Island to turn them into Titans. Gross grew annoyed with a Restorationist's yelling and kicked him off the wall while the other soldiers started injecting the rest of the Restorationists with Titan serum and watched as they all turned into Titans and started chasing after him. Gross told Kruger to turn Grisha into a Titan but Kruger responded that he still wanted to interrogate him.

After injecting a female Restorationist Gross was confronted by Grisha about his hand in Fay's death. Remembering Grisha, Gross decided not to turn him into a Titan and instead force him to fight one of his transformed comrades. Grisha asked Gross why was he doing this and he said because it was fun to watch humans get eaten by monsters and that he needed that entertainment in his life. Gross injected the last Restorationist, proclaiming that the world wanted Eldians eradicated because of the danger their ability to turn into Titans posed. Gross began to throw Grisha from the wall, but was himself pushed off by Kruger. Landing in front of the Titan he had just transformed, Gross is immediately devoured.

People killed

Indirectly

Fay Jaeger
Grice
Numerous Eldians

Trivia

Gross and Dimo Reeves share the same English voice actor.
Gross's death is played for irony; in his speech to Grisha, Gross claimed that he can accept his death whenever it comes, but he was screaming in agony as a Titan ate him just a couple moments after saying that.
The name "Gross" is derived from the German word "groß", meaning "great."
